title: Experience More Advancements
description: A bunch of multiplayer compatible advancements I made.
body:
# Summary

This is a collection of advancements I put made.

I might add more from time to time as these took a while to put together.

## Advancements


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Deep Sea Diver (dive to the bottom of a deep ocean biome)
- Siren Killer (kill an elder gaurdian)
- Who lives in a... (Obtain sponge)
- General Farmer (Obtain the 6 common crops)
- Crop Researcher (Obtain the remaining crops)
- Gardener's Delight (Collect all potable Flowers)
- Colors of the Wind (Collect all dyes)
- Sup Doc? (Break 1 Million Carrot Plants By Hand)
- Spud-llinaire (Break 1 Million Potato Plants By Hand)
- Do you like Jazz? (Obtain all music discs)
- Betayal (Kill a snow golem)
- Community Reject (Kill a villager)
- We Built this city (Have 40 or more villager within 50 blocks of you)
- Well Experienced (Reach XP level 100)
- Accident Prone (Use 10 totems)
- Followed to the pit (Kill a warden in the nether)
- Nucleus of the end (Acivate all 20 End Gateways) [This will give the advancement to all players]
- Proclaimer (5000 blocks from overworld spawn)
- I'm Gonna Be (10000 blocks from overworld spawn)
- Walk-a-thon (100000 blocks from overworld spawn)
- Terry Fox (500000 blocks from overworld spawn)
- HikaNation (1 Million blocks from overworld spawn)
- Walk for Peace (10 Million blocks from overworld spawn)
- And this is how the world ends... (Make it to the world boarder)

</details>
